assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check for PDB blocking drain (most common cause)' and later emphasizes 'Based on the symptoms (nodes not draining), PDBs are the most common culprit'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command to check PDB status across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: kubectl get events with EvictionBlocked filter, kubectl get pods for Pending/Terminating pods, and a comprehensive diagnosis script

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Section 2 covers resource constraints with commands to check pending pods, scheduling failures, and node resource usage with kubectl top nodes

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch commands to adjust maxUnavailable to 50% or 100% and includes backup/restore procedures

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: While it mentions 'GKE waits up to 1 hour for pod eviction during upgrades', it doesn't specifically mention force-drain behavior or GKE notifications about PDB blocking

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to increase max-surge-upgrade to 2 and set max-unavailable-upgrade to 0 for faster parallel upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission webhooks or webhook-related issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring command with 'watch kubectl get nodes' and suggests monitoring upgrade progress after applying fixes
